elements.commentary:

The @[R Consortium](urn:li:organization:36080541) ISC top-level project R-Universe is working with Bioconductor to gradually modernize parts of its infrastructure while accommodating the project’s scale, governance, and established processes.

elements.commentary:
\[blog\] Breaking Release of the patentsview Package

Russ Allen and Chris Baker introduce major updates to patentsview following breaking changes to the PatentsView API 🔧
  
Learn what's changed and how to update your code to work with the new API endpoints and structure.
  
https://lnkd.in/dxuguHQw
  
⚠️ Note: A PatentsView API key is now required & there is some uncertainty around the long-term API viability

elements.author: urn:li:organization:77132573

article.title: rOpenSci
article.description: Open Tools and R Packages for Open Science

elements.commentary:
On International Women’s Day, we celebrate the many women who shape rOpenSci every day. 💙

From software development and peer review to mentorship, community leadership, and training, women are building and strengthening open science across our global community.

They play key roles across rOpenSci:

💻 developing and maintaining research software
🔍 serving as software editors and reviewers
🎓 training, mentoring, and championing the next generation of contributors
🌱 leading community programs
🧩 shaping policies for open and reproducible science

You can meet some of these women on our website:
https://ropensci.org

The strength of rOpenSci comes from the people who contribute to it. Today, we celebrate the women who lead, collaborate, and support others in open science and reaffirm our commitment to building inclusive communities where everyone can thrive. ✨ 

Tag or highlight some woman whose work inspires you in the rOpenSci community. 🙌 

Let’s recognize the people who make open science stronger every day.

{hashtag|\#|IWD2026} {hashtag|\#|WomenInOpenScience} {hashtag|\#|RSE} {hashtag|\#|RStats}
